name: skills
description: Personal Claude skills for keeping any codebase navigable as it grows — assess shape (nav-audit, with feasibility mode), reshape with discipline (nav-refactor), generate the human-readable navigation map (nav-map), add skill-style file headers (nav-headers), and orchestrate the full health pass (nav-doctor). Language-agnostic. Built on Ousterhout's deep-module principles + grounding discipline.
